ui.title: SCF Status of Invoice
ui.desc: Invoice volume and values grouped by status.

data.sql: SELECT CASE C_TRX_STATUS WHEN 'M' THEN 'Active' WHEN 'P' THEN 'Pending' WHEN 'S' THEN 'Settled' ELSE C_TRX_STATUS END as "Status", COUNT(*) as "Total_Invoices" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER GROUP BY C_TRX_STATUS
